_comment: Single source of truth for committed deployed-bitstream baselines. md5s are NOT stored here -- they are computed live from git by tools/baselines.py (git show <commit>:<bit_path> | md5sum) so they can never drift / be copy-pasted wrong (e.g. the D99 hwh once recorded as D98's). current_deployed is a historical field name; it marks the current accepted committed baseline, not an uncommitted live-board candidate. Edit only the seed fields below; regenerate docs/ai_context/BASELINES.md with `python3 tools/baselines.py render`.

baselines.note: 4x oversampled Big Muff clip cascade; pre-realism-amp baseline
dedicated-stage voicings (JC-120 clean / OD biquad TS9+BD-2 / Klon / AC30 sag); superseded by D93
anti-alias pre/de-emphasis around amp clip stages
DSP island 40->33MHz + output-transformer LF saturation
amp waveshaper hysteresis (per-sample memory)
transformer HF droop + cab output micro-modulation
transformer LF resonance + multiband mid-sat + reverb diffusion
96 kHz conversion + whole-chain re-voicing; major baseline (D107 fell back here)
behaviour-preserving DSP helper refactor; behaviour == D98. rollback target after D120 rejection
amp/RAT input-HP pole at higher corner; later found bypass-muffled, superseded
amp full revoicing on the D109 CDC knife-edge fix; the long-standing accepted baseline before the D113-D120 amp-retune line
amp model-identity constant retune; superseded by later accepted lines
non-amp effect constant retune (OD/Dist/Cab/Reverb); PL smoke blocked and later superseded
RAT highpass dead-pole fix + RAT identity retune; superseded by later accepted RAT/DIST passes
amp de-muffle constant retune; superseded by later accepted lines
disable amp power-sag master modulation; bench-REJECTED, reverted to D118
remove dynamic sag + static master trim; bench-REJECTED. Source only on branch feature/amp-static-sag-d120 (no committed bit)
rolled the deployed baseline all the way back to D99 (== D98 96 kHz amp) after the whole D113-D120 amp-retune line was bench-rejected
off-target non-amp voicing on the D99 amp baseline: BD-2/OCD, Metal scoop, Cab presence
amp per-model voicing: JC-120 flatter, Rockerverb low-mid, TriAmp scoop
cab per-model presence biquad; Open/British/Closed separation
RAT live-pole highpass fix; RAT now distorts
Compressor Dyna/Ross sustain; RATIO now effective
reference-alignment pass: OD-1/DS-1/RAT pedals + JCM800 bright-cap
amp realism: PRESENCE effective + high-gain Drive/Clean separation; aggressive first build rejected, moderate retune accepted
OD/DS/RAT EQ re-collation: Metal MT-2 mid boost, Klon mid bump, OD-1/BD-2/JanRay/DS-1/Fuzz tweaks
amp 2nd-pass EQ re-collation: JC-120 flat, AC30 sparkle, JCM800 modest top
DIST realism: low-end + saturation/sustain fixes and offline dist_eval/targets tooling

all-effects sim survey + comprehensive sim problem-detectors (muffled/clean-distort) + bass(amp HP dead->live)/HF-restore(un-muffle)/Metal drive/RESONANCE dead-knob/AC30 amp re-voicing; 3-cycle target calibration
Metal full saturation (os4x clip floor 1.05M->600k + post-LPF open) + clean-amp power headroom (per-model ampPowerKnee, JC-120/Twin); superseded by D134
sim-scale all-effect objective evaluation + knob-visibility fixes for Amp PRESENCE/RESONANCE, Cab AIR, and Noise Suppressor DECAY/DAMP; superseded by D135

large non-IR realism: Fuzz Face 900Hz mid-hump biquad + tighter clip knees + opened tone LPF; AC30/JCM800 stronger ampScoop + model-local presence; Amp MIDDLE more audible; AC30 clean headroom; Cab non-IR body tap. Merge commit 765323b. Long-standing accepted baseline; superseded by D148. Rollback target (git checkout 765323b -- hw/Pynq-Z2/bitstreams/)

chord-IMD fix (slew-limit the power-sag attack). Bench: chords improved but part of the rolled-back amp-clean-headroom line. Branch feature/amp-clean-headroom; rolled back to D135. NOTE the sag-attack slew itself was later re-accepted as part of D148 (via D147)

cleaner clean chords + clean<=drive level. Bench-REJECTED: safe-bypass CDC knife-edge = amp-on/amp-off DIGITAL BUZZ (bypass passthrough corrupted; D135 amp-off confirmed clean). Re-place (Explore = byte-identical placement) AND tighter CDC max_delay 10->6ns BOTH failed to clear the buzz. Rolled back to D135. Branch feature/amp-clean-headroom

JC-120 / Fender-Twin clean-headroom fix (playing-only 音割れ; bypass confirmed clean = not CDC). Localized with new tools/dsp_sim/clip_onset.py: JC broke up ~0.18 FS at the power/master soft knee, Twin ~0.12-0.18 FS at the ampAsymClip waveshaper. Fix (placement-safe constants/mux, no new multiply): ampPowerKnee JC 6.8M->8.2M + Twin 4.6M->6.8M + clean-mode-only ampCleanKneeBonus (Twin 2.5M); both now clean to ~0.25 FS. Surgical -- golden 20/20 NO re-bless (bypass bit-exact). Merge commit 96ef899 ALSO carries D146 hard pblock (placement-locked audio-output CDC, SLICE_X100Y116:SLICE_X113Y137) + D147 amp sag-attack slew (ampSagAttackStep=96, chord-IMD fix). Build MET WNS+0.526/WHS+0.014, route 0, D109 CDC pair MET, XDC max_delay 10ns. BENCH-ACCEPTED. Superseded by D149 (cab real-IR B1). Rollback target (git checkout 96ef899 -- hw/Pynq-Z2/bitstreams/)

Cab real-IR R4 step B1: 15-tap -> 31-tap rolloff-only folded speaker FIR (Signed-16 Q16, unity-DC sum 2^16, +8 DSP = 16 folded MACs) for a real-4x12 sharp >5 kHz rolloff. Option Y: the FIR supplies ONLY the rolloff, the existing per-model presence biquad keeps the 2-4 kHz peak (so 31 taps suffice; full 128-tap time-mux MAC = B2 deferred). Sim-first via new tools/dsp_sim/cab_ir.py + docs/ai_context/CAB_IR_R4_STEP_B_PLAN.md. Offline rolloff 5-12k open -9->-17 / brit -11->-23 / closed -11->-28 dB/oct, measure.py --check all PASS, regression = cab golden re-blessed only (bypass bit-exact, all else unchanged). Nonlinear 4-tap core + presence biquad + micro-mod untouched. Build MET WNS+0.597/WHS+0.008/WPWS+2.845, route 0, D109 CDC pair fwd +1.416 / rev +7.154, D146 hard pblock intact (112 cells SLICE_X100Y116:SLICE_X113Y137), DSP 181/220. PL smoke PASS (mode 2 ~96.1 kHz). BENCH-ACCEPTED, CURRENT ACCEPTED / COMMITTED BASELINE. Rollback to D148: git checkout 96ef899 -- hw/Pynq-Z2/bitstreams/

OD/DS symmetric-clip chord-IMD fix: symmetrise gainy OD models (OD-1/BD-2/OCD/Klon) + DS-1 clip slope (new FixedPoint.symSoftClipMed; odClipHardness 4/OCD->3; odKneeN raised; DS-1->symSoftClipMed knee 2.15M) to remove even-order chord IMD; placement-safe, no os4x, bypass bit-exact (only od_ocd+distortion_ds1 goldens changed)

amp HF brighten (rig use): post-amp shift-only HF shelf (ampHfShelfFrame, amp-on, skips JC-120) + per-model cab presence-peak biquad +3.0/3.5/4.0->6.0/6.5/7.0 dB (D149 >5kHz rolloff FIR untouched, the effective rig lever); placement-safe no new DSP, bypass bit-exact (only 5 tube-amp + cab goldens changed); rig 2-4kHz +2-3 dB

JC-120/Twin 音割れ fix (D152 cab-headroom made the clean amps too hot): restore cabSpeakerKnee to D151 (peak limiter) + keep D152 early-stage cab headroom (body/presence knees) + presence-peak pull-back (+4.5/5.0/5.5 dB) + trim JC/Twin master ~-1.3 dB (ampMasterFrame, shift-only). Carries the D152 chord-IMD cleanup. Placement-safe constant/shift-only, no new DSP; bypass bit-exact (only amp_jc120+amp_twin goldens changed)

cab speaker FIR 31->47 taps (Option-Y folded extension, NOT the 128-tap BRAM B2): sharper real-4x12 >5kHz rolloff (open -14.9/brit -22.0/closed -28.9 dB/oct), presence biquad keeps the 2-4kHz peak so D151 brightness untouched; cabSpeakerFirCoeff Vec16->Vec24, history Vec30->Vec46, 24 folded products; only cab golden changed, bypass bit-exact. Build WNS +0.319, D109 CDC fwd +0.989 (lowest of arc, bench-clean), DSP 206/220. Also carries the A deploy no-download integrity check (+ step-7.5 ordering fix). D154 (gain-amp chord IMD) investigated, no net-improving fix (incl multiband), not shipped
